## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Data update
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] README/DATA.md updated if behavior, tools, install steps, or counts changed
- [ ] SECURITY.md updated if the threat model changed

## Notes

Mention any migration, release, or follow-up work needed.
